endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Fabric.Admin/fabricLocations/{location}/storageOperationResults
endpoints.description: Returns a list of all storage operation results at a location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Fabric.Admin/fabricLocations/{location}/storageOperationResults/{operation}
endpoints.description: Returns the status of a storage operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{OPERATION}} with a real operation.
